chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2379 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application 21.10.2025 Dur Muhammad Mallah, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Talib Hussain Mangi, Asstt: Prosecutor General, Sindh ************ Learned Counsel for the Applicant after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this Criminal Bail Application and states that the directions may be given to the learned Trial Court to conclude the trial and decide the subject case expeditiously. Such proposal is not opposed by the learned Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. In view of above, this Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed. The expeditious trial is a right of an accused; therefore, learned Trial Court is directed to decide the subject case preferably within a period of two months positively from the date of receipt of this Order and to furnish such progress report to the MIT-II of this Court. It is made clear that no adjournment would be granted to either party on flimsy ground. The Applicant would be at liberty to file a fresh bail application before the Trial Court, if Trial Court fails to conclude the trial within stipulated period. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the learned Trial Court for compliance. JUDGE Qurban
